instruction: Open Safari and search Wikipedia for {TERM} by loading https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php with the search query for {TERM}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 URL fidelity); url_match_normalized with keep_query keeps the load-bearing search term while still dropping tracking params

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to quit' 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to make new document with properties {URL:"https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=placeholder"}' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search={TERM}&utm_source=test"' -e 'delay 1' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Safari" to return URL of front document
